## Summary

- Describe the change and user impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint` if your touched files are already on the current Biome baseline
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Preview or staging deploy reviewed

## Main Deploy Checklist

Complete this section only if the target branch is `main`.

- [ ] Reviewed [docs/pre-deploy-checklist.md](../docs/pre-deploy-checklist.md)
- [ ] Production env vars checked
- [ ] Rollback plan noted
